TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Taywan Genzyuminrok nanu san maha Taywan Geenzyu minrok hiya, nyan skayal qabax ccquliq qa Genzyuminrok hiya ga nyan skaki cinqlangan Taywan, lhga ga cinbuyux na ccquliq nyan m'culah Indigenous. Iyat minqutux nanak cquliq qa Taywan Genzyuminrok qani, cqani ga nyan cinbuyux cinqlangan qa roq na Taywan, knpiyux ini ptnaq qa hngya'an na ke ro ccquliq ga nyan ini ptnaq pinsqunqn naha uyi, ski coni ga mpux tiyu qa gluw Tayal nyan ini ptnaq iyik ini kyupan Kahat Taywan naga, nyan cinbuyux ana n'inu roq qa ccqliq Taywan Genzyumin qani, calay ga nyan skura maki bih iyk rrgyax, ini ga skura roq qa htgan wagi kyaro roq na Ta'u, mica cinbuyux n'inu ccquliq na Taywan Genzyumin qa klhangan na CwonFaminkoku qa ni ga san naha knki'an na Genzyumin, knrtung na keg a san naha kinhulan na Genzyuminrok, sta saying seng payat byaling ga kya hayi miman payat mang qesux seng qutux kbhul pusal pitu hi, ana ga sinpngan kwara ccquliq taywan qa ita Taywan Genzyumin rok hiya ga kya hayi saying ro tiyul payat paseng qabax hi nya. Bnrwan qa galan cpung . 2016ŚĻī4śúą (2016ŚĻī5śúą14śó•) .
S.PHON: tajwan …£enzjuminrok nanu s~…ēan mańßa tajwan …£eenzju minrok ńßija, njan s~…ēkajal qaő≤ax ¶~ ® ¶~ ®quliq qa …£enzjuminrok ńßija …£a njan s~…ēkaki ¶~ ®inqlaŇčan tajwan, lńß…£a …£a ¶~ ®inő≤ujux na ¶~ ® ¶~ ®quliq njan m Ē ¶~ ®ulańß in*i…£enous~…ē. ijat minqutux nanak ¶~ ®quliq qa tajwan …£enzjuminrok qani, ¶~ ®qani …£a njan ¶~ ®inő≤ujux ¶~ ®inqlaŇčan qa roq na tajwan, knpijux ini ptnaq qa ńßŇčja Ēan na ke ro ¶~ ® ¶~ ®quliq …£a njan ini ptnaq pins~…ēqunqn nańßa uji, s~…ēki ¶~ ®oni …£a mpux tiju qa …£luw tajal njan ini ptnaq ijik ini kjupan kańßat tajwan na…£a, njan ¶~ ®inő≤ujux ana n Ēinu roq qa ¶~ ® ¶~ ®qliq tajwan …£enzjumin qani, ¶~ ®alaj …£a njan s~…ēkura maki ő≤ińß ijk rr…£jax, ini …£a s~…ēkura roq qa ńßt…£an wa…£i kjaro roq na ta Ēu, mi ¶~ ®a ¶~ ®inő≤ujux n Ēinu ¶~ ® ¶~ ®quliq na tajwan …£enzjumin qa klńßaŇčan na ¶~ ®won*aminkoku qa ni …£a s~…ēan nańßa knki Ēan na …£enzjumin, knrtuŇč na ke…£ a s~…ēan nańßa kinńßulan na …£enzjuminrok, s~…ēta s~…ēajiŇč s~…ēeŇč pajat ő≤jaliŇč …£a kja ńßaji miman pajat maŇč qes~…ēux s~…ēeŇč qutux kő≤ńßul pus~…ēal pitu ńßi, ana …£a s~…ēinpŇčan kwara ¶~ ® ¶~ ®quliq tajwan qa ita tajwan …£enzjumin rok ńßija …£a kja ńßaji s~…ēajiŇč ro tijul pajat pas~…ēeŇč qaő≤ax ńßi nja. ő≤nrwan qa …£alan ¶~ ®puŇč . ******* (**********) .
S.FORM: Taywan Genzyuminrok nanu san maha Taywan Geenzyu minrok hiya, nyan skayal qabax ccquliq qa Genzyuminrok hiya ga nyan skaki cinqlangan Taywan, lhga ga cinbuyux na ccquliq nyan m'culah Indigenous. Iyat minqutux nanak cquliq qa Taywan Genzyuminrok qani, cqani ga nyan cinbuyux cinqlangan qa roq na Taywan, knpiyux ini ptnaq qa hngya'an na ke ro ccquliq ga nyan ini ptnaq pinsqunqn naha uyi, ski coni ga mpux tiyu qa gluw Tayal nyan ini ptnaq iyik ini kyupan Kahat Taywan naga, nyan cinbuyux ana n'inu roq qa ccqliq Taywan Genzyumin qani, calay ga nyan skura maki bih iyk rrgyax, ini ga skura roq qa htgan wagi kyaro roq na Ta'u, mica cinbuyux n'inu ccquliq na Taywan Genzyumin qa klhangan na CwonFaminkoku qa ni ga san naha knki'an na Genzyumin, knrtung na keg a san naha kinhulan na Genzyuminrok, sta saying seng payat byaling ga kya hayi miman payat mang qesux seng qutux kbhul pusal pitu hi, ana ga sinpngan kwara ccquliq taywan qa ita Taywan Genzyumin rok hiya ga kya hayi saying ro tiyul payat paseng qabax hi nya. Bnrwan qa galan cpung . 2016ŚĻī4śúą (2016ŚĻī5śúą14śó•) .
